final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary campaign.

Style/medium: needs a festive e-commerce campaign aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be vertical poster layout with clear visual hierarchy for promotional messaging
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 brand identity as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a celebratory 618 sale event atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 绿联 brand identity and 618 festive energy — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (large, prominent), "周年庆" (secondary)
Constraints: must read as an e-commerce announcement poster; brand name and 618 event mark must be clearly legible
Avoid:
